description: Ahmad Abbasi discusses the development of a new validator client for the Solana blockchain, built in Zig, and its implications for the ecosystem. He shares insights on the transition from an RPC service to building a validator client to enhance RPC capabilities. The conversation covers the motivations behind this shift, the technical choices made, and the response from the community.
topic_summary: The episode explores the creation of a Zig-based validator client for Solana, addressing the need for diverse client implementations and the strategic decisions made by Syndica amidst a challenging market environment. Key points include the evolution of the project from an RPC service to a validator client and the technical advantages of using Zig.
